features.name: recursive module instantiation with parameter decrement
features.description: Code should include a module that recursively instantiates itself with a modified parameter value (WAY-1)

features.name: cross_file_include_cycle_with_header_guards
features.description: Code should include a cycle of cross-file includes between modules using header guards (ifndef/__define)

features.name: chparam_override_before_hierarchy_check
features.description: Code should include a script that uses chparam to override module parameters before calling hierarchy -check

features.name: conditional_if_in_module_body_with_recursion
features.description: Code should include a module with non-generate if blocks at module scope that conditionally instantiate another module which recursively instantiates itself

features.name: parameterized_bit_select_range_with_multiplication
features.description: Code should include port declarations with bit-select ranges computed from parameter multiplication
features.snippet:
input [(WAY * WIRE)-1 : 0] D;
output [(WAY * WIRE)-1:0] Q, QN;
